title: Vice President Architect
description:
• Lead project team in key areas of design / supervision / management for a wide range of projects.
  • Undertake key role of establishing contacts and presenting architectural designs to clients.
  • Be involved in business development meetings to strategise and target specific markets, clients and project opportunities.
  • Lead a team in architectural design competitions.
  • Contract administration of construction projects to ensure that project is built according to design intent and in compliance with building codes.
  • Take charge of numerous projects at any given time.
  • Possibly take on the role of QP (Qualified Person), SO (Superintending Officer) and SO’s Rep, etc.
  • Be in charge of project P&L and resource planning, and be accountable to SVP and Management for project performance.

Requirements:

  • Minimum Bachelor's/Masteral Degree in Architecture or equivalent
  • Registered BOA
  • At least 8 years of working experience in the related field.
  • Proficient in BIM (Revit), Sketchup, Adobe Photoshop
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications
  • Possess good interpersonal skills and a team player
  • A hands-on person who is positive, proactive and driven
  • Meticulous and able to organise work effectively.

postedCompany.description:
The COENS Group is an integrated services provider headquartered in Busan, South Korea since 1999. Our over 20 years of experience in managing and executing workforce solutions and other technical services for international projects make us an ideal partner of Clients, placing us as a top integrated services provider in South Korea. Our prowess lies in furnishing tailored project solutions to organizations involved in the delivery of some of the world’s largest and most complex projects with a particular expertise in providing full project teams. With over 16 offices in strategic locations in Asia and beyond, COENS is staffed with industry specialists backed with many years of relevant experience in the provision of recruitment, destination mobility services and project site support to Clients in key industries. 


COENS has operational offices in over 6 countries worldwide including South Korea, China, Singapore, Myanmar, Russia, and USA. Our depth and presence in these strategic locations stamps our territory to ably yield to client’s needs on a local, regional and global level. With trusted know-how in project support, COENS expanded our field to various sectors by establishing associated offices and entities. 


COENS Energy Pte Ltd. in Singapore is a licensed Employment Agency.  Its industry experienced staff provides manpower services to Clients in various sectors such as Oil and Gas, Chemical, ICT, Civil Infrastructure, Building Construction, and Financial Services. In more recent years, it has provided technical recruitment, contractor management, tailored project solutions, and assignment support services through its highly experienced delivery teams.
postedCompany.name: COENS ENERGY PTE. LTD.
